block_04: Traders aren’t born, they are made. This summer will show who's the best trader in Asia since we are hosting an outstanding series of trading tournaments for the vast Asian trading community. Traders all over Asia will be competing in 4 free tournaments that will secure them a place in the 5th Final Battle with a $5,000 prize fund!
block_06: From June 29-August 2, 2020, there will be 4 free tournaments, each lasting a week. Each free tournament will have up to 20 winners who will get a ticket to the Final Battle to compete with the best for the title of №1 trader in Asia.
block_07: Will you win one of the lucky tickets?
